compiled_state.title: fix(c73a-1918): add docs/* glob patterns to plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf for shipped plugin reference docs
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The allowlist at plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf is missing patterns for 31 legitimate shipped plugin reference docs at plugins/dso/docs/*.md, docs/*.json, docs/*.conf. Running the hook against a fresh staging of the post-S1 plugin directory produces violations for all root-level docs files (INSTALL.md, VERSIONING.md, ticket-cli-reference.md, etc.). Fix: add docs/*.md, docs/*.json, docs/*.conf, and docs/.gitkeep patterns to the allowlist. Also update test assertion 4 in tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh to test a docs root-level file in addition to a scripts file, to prevent regression. Criterion 4 of story c73a-1918 done definitions is FAIL until this is fixed.
